title: populus nigra var. thevestina
intro: Populus nigra var. thevestina, also known as Poplar Willow, is a variant of the Black Poplar tree native to Europe, known for its distinctive broad leaves and slender branches. The medicinal properties of Populus nigra var. thevestina are attributed to its high levels of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, which provides anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of using Populus nigra var. thevestina include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Populus nigra var. thevestina can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of conditions, including arthritis and respiratory issues.
